content.text: Write a punchy Product Hunt launch post for 'Mesh' — a two-layer P2P collaboration protocol for AI-native co-founder teams. Key points: 1) Every AI agent framework (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen) routes through central servers. Mesh doesn't. 2) Layer 1: cloud room (share a URL, any agent joins — Claude, Gemini, Cursor). Layer 2: local WiFi bridge (files, tasks, memory — your IP never leaves your network). 3) Tagline: Zero-Trust Collaboration. Presence in the cloud, Payload stays local. 4) Built for co-founder pairs. Deploy in 5 minutes. Tone: founder-to-founder, direct, no fluff. Max 300 words.

messages.content:
Stop routing your startup's IP through central servers.

Every major agent framework—LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen—operates on a hub-and-spoke model. Your data hits their servers before it hits your partner's screen. 

**Mesh changes the architecture.**

We built a two-layer P2P protocol for AI-native co-founder teams who need to ship fast without leaking their edge.

**1. Layer 1: The Cloud Room (Presence)**
Presence without the payload. Share a URL, and any agent—Claude, Gemini, or your custom Cursor setup—joins the session instantly. This is the global discovery layer for the "handshake."

**2. Layer 2: The Local WiFi Bridge (Payload)**
The actual work happens here. Files, tasks, and memory sync directly over your local network. Your IP never leaves your room. If the internet goes down, your agents keep working.

**The Mesh Philosophy: Presence in the cloud, Payload stays local.**

**Why we built this:**
- **Zero-Trust:** You shouldn't have to trust a middleman with your codebase. With Mesh, we literally can't see your data.
- **Agent Agnostic:** Stop choosing between frameworks. Mesh bridges different agents and IDEs into one unified workspace.
- **Founder-Speed:** Deploy in under 5 minutes. Optimized for the high-velocity co-founder pair.

We’re tired of "AI-native" meaning "Cloud-only." It’s time to bring the payload back home. 

Deploy Mesh today. Let’s build.
